title: NodeHandler accesses internal gradient_table._entries
description:
**Location:** python/src/lichen/interface/handler.py:165

**Risk:** The `get_mesh_state()` method directly accesses `self.node.gradient_table._entries.values()`, a private attribute. This creates a coupling that will break if GradientTable's implementation changes.

**Trigger:** Refactor GradientTable to use a different internal structure.

**Bad behavior:** TypeError or AttributeError in NodeHandler.get_mesh_state().

**Maintainer burden:** Contributors may not realize this dependency exists. The TODO comment (line 163-164) acknowledges this.

**Fix:** Add a public iteration method to GradientTable (e.g., `def entries(self) -> Iterable[GradientEntry]`).
